vocab.meaning: biểu tượng của địa vị xã hội
vocab.example: For many young people, high-end sneakers serve as a status symbol rather than just a piece of footwear.

vocab.meaning: tay nghề thủ công vô song (độ tinh xảo cực cao)
vocab.example: I am willing to pay more for luxury brands because of the unrivaled craftsmanship that ensures the shoes last for years.

vocab.meaning: sự trung thành với thương hiệu
vocab.example: My brand loyalty stems from their consistent sizing and the fact that their soles never wear out prematurely.
Famous athletic brands invest heavily in cutting-edge technology to enhance shock absorption for runners.

vocab.meaning: chi quá nhiều tiền/tốn rất nhiều tiền
vocab.example: I only buy famous labels during the sales season because I don't want to break the bank on a single pair of boots.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Beyond the name, the aesthetic appeal of their latest collection is what really caught my eye.

vocab.meaning: sản xuất hàng loạt (thường ám chỉ chất lượng thấp hơn đồ hiệu)
vocab.example: I’ve moved away from mass-produced footwear in favor of reputable brands that prioritize sustainable materials.
Certain limited-edition shoes from famous brands actually increase in resale value over time, making them a unique asset.

vocab.meaning: quảng cáo/xác nhận chất lượng (thường bởi người nổi tiếng)
vocab.example: I'm often skeptical of products that celebrities endorse, but famous shoe brands usually back up the hype with real comfort.

vocab.meaning: những lựa chọn thay thế không có thương hiệu (hàng thường)
vocab.example: While generic alternatives are budget-friendly, they often lack the structural integrity found in big-name brands.
